title: Restore fully functional Create Client form submission

requirements.text: In ClientDetailPage.tsx, fix the 'Create' / 'Save' button so that submitting the new-client form in create mode actually calls createClient with the entered field values and navigates back to '/clients' on success. The button must not be disabled, must have a valid onClick or form onSubmit handler, and must not silently fail. Ensure the mutation is correctly wired to the backend actor via the useQueries hook and that any loading or error states are surfaced to the user.

quotes: Yes it takes me to the create screen- problem is after typing in my example *create* button does not actually work. Please restore the fully functional UI as designed.

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to '/clients/new' renders the ClientDetailPage in create mode with all form fields empty.
Filling in the form fields (name, phone, address, notes, email) and clicking the 'Create' / 'Save' button triggers the createClient mutation.
On successful createClient response the user is navigated back to '/clients' and the new client appears in the list.
If createClient fails, an error message is displayed and the user remains on the form.
The button is never rendered in a permanently disabled state when the form has valid input.
No console errors or unhandled promise rejections occur during the create flow.

requirements.text: In JobDetailPage.tsx, verify and fix the 'Create' / 'Save' button in new-job create mode so that it calls createJob with the entered field values and navigates to the job detail page or '/jobs' on success. The mutation must be correctly wired to the backend actor and must not be a no-op.

quotes: Please restore the fully functional UI as designed.

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to '/jobs/new' renders JobDetailPage in create mode with form fields empty.
Clicking 'Create' / 'Save' with valid input calls the createJob mutation.
On success the user is navigated away from the create form.
On failure an error message is shown and the user remains on the form.

requirements.text: Audit all form submission handlers (onSubmit / onClick) across ClientDetailPage.tsx and JobDetailPage.tsx to ensure: (1) event.preventDefault() is called where needed to prevent page reloads, (2) the mutation functions returned by useQueries hooks are invoked with the correct argument shapes matching the backend endpoint signatures, and (3) async mutation calls are properly awaited or use onSuccess/onError callbacks so navigation and error handling fire correctly.

quotes: Please restore the fully functional UI as designed.

acceptanceCriteria: Form submission does not cause a full page reload.
Mutation arguments match the expected backend input types.
Success and error callbacks execute reliably after mutation resolution.
No orphaned async calls that resolve after the component has unmounted.

constraints: Do not change backend endpoints or data models.
Do not remove or regress any existing working features (photos, labor, Stripe payment, invoice, signature, inventory, calendar).
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Adding new fields or features to the client or job forms.
Changing routing structure beyond what is needed to fix form submission.
